name: dnanexus-integration
tagline: Reference skill for building DNAnexus apps, moving genomic data, and scripting the dxpy SDK.
verdict: No security red flags: it only documents the platform's own `dx login` auth flow, uses official PyPI dxpy, and has no piped remote execution, obfuscation, or hidden instructions. Minor quality gaps: no negative-use guidance, no explicit output contract, and no note that repeated upload/run patterns aren't idempotent. Safe to install; treat the shown code as

highlights.summary: No 'do not use when' guidance anywhere in the file; a user could invoke it for unrelated genomics tasks outside DNAnexus with no steer-away.
No explicit statement of what the agent should return to the user (file, summary, job status) after following the workflow.
Only a general 'wrap API calls in try-except' best-practice bullet (line 350); no guidance for skill-specific failure modes like auth expiry or missing reference docs.
